SEARCH
Package com.example.junimoapp

Class QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.junimoapp.QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
public class QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest extends Object
Local unit tests for QR code scanning and private invite accept/decline logic. All tests call real methods on real model objects. Stories covered: - US 01.06.01: Entrant views event details by scanning a QR code - US 01.05.07: Entrant accepts or declines a private event waiting list invite

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    privateInvite_afterDecline_userNotInvited()
    US 01.05.07 Simulates declining a private invite — removes eventID from invitedEvents.
    void
    privateInvite_afterInvite_userIsInvited()
    US 01.05.07 Simulates the inviteUser logic from PrivateInviteActivity: appends eventID to invitedEvents string, then checks isInvited().
    void
    privateInvite_declineOne_doesNotAffectOther()
    US 01.05.07 Verifies that declining one event does not affect invitation to another.
    void
    privateInvite_invitingTwice_doesNotDuplicate()
    US 01.05.07 Verifies that inviting the same user twice does not duplicate the eventID.
    void
    privateInvite_userNotInvitedByDefault()
    US 01.05.07 Calls user.isInvited() before any invite — should be false.
    void
    qr_eventQRCodeFormat_matchesExpectedPrefix()
    US 01.06.01 Verifies that the QR code stored on a public Event object matches the expected format used by QRScanActivity to parse eventID.
    void
    qr_invalidString_returnsNull()
    US 01.06.01 Verifies that an unrecognised QR string returns null.
    void
    qr_nullString_returnsNull()
    US 01.06.01 Verifies that a null raw value returns null safely.
    void
    qr_privateEvent_hasNoQRCode()
    US 01.06.01 Verifies that a private event has no QR code — private events should not generate a promotional QR (US 02.01.02).
    void
    qr_validJunimoString_parsesEventId()
    US 01.06.01 Verifies that a valid junimo QR string is correctly recognised.
    void
    setUp()

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest

      public QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp()

    • qr_validJunimoString_parsesEventId

      public void qr_validJunimoString_parsesEventId()
      US 01.06.01 Verifies that a valid junimo QR string is correctly recognised. Simulates the parseEventId logic from QRScanActivity.

    • qr_invalidString_returnsNull

      public void qr_invalidString_returnsNull()
      US 01.06.01 Verifies that an unrecognised QR string returns null. The app should show an error and not navigate.

    • qr_nullString_returnsNull

      public void qr_nullString_returnsNull()
      US 01.06.01 Verifies that a null raw value returns null safely.

    • qr_eventQRCodeFormat_matchesExpectedPrefix

      public void qr_eventQRCodeFormat_matchesExpectedPrefix()
      US 01.06.01 Verifies that the QR code stored on a public Event object matches the expected format used by QRScanActivity to parse eventID.

    • qr_privateEvent_hasNoQRCode

      public void qr_privateEvent_hasNoQRCode()
      US 01.06.01 Verifies that a private event has no QR code — private events should not generate a promotional QR (US 02.01.02).

    • privateInvite_userNotInvitedByDefault

      public void privateInvite_userNotInvitedByDefault()
      US 01.05.07 Calls user.isInvited() before any invite — should be false.

    • privateInvite_afterInvite_userIsInvited

      public void privateInvite_afterInvite_userIsInvited()
      US 01.05.07 Simulates the inviteUser logic from PrivateInviteActivity: appends eventID to invitedEvents string, then checks isInvited().

    • privateInvite_afterDecline_userNotInvited

      public void privateInvite_afterDecline_userNotInvited()
      US 01.05.07 Simulates declining a private invite — removes eventID from invitedEvents. Mirrors the declineInvite() logic in InvitationsActivity.

    • privateInvite_declineOne_doesNotAffectOther

      public void privateInvite_declineOne_doesNotAffectOther()
      US 01.05.07 Verifies that declining one event does not affect invitation to another.

    • privateInvite_invitingTwice_doesNotDuplicate

      public void privateInvite_invitingTwice_doesNotDuplicate()
      US 01.05.07 Verifies that inviting the same user twice does not duplicate the eventID. Mirrors the duplicate check in PrivateInviteActivity.inviteUser().
